text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has begun. I want to use this opportunity to get Nishino
Flower to relax and open up around me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to work hard so I can grow even more as an Umamusume!
Oh, but I'm also fine with doing solo training!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I have to make sure I don't burden Trainer. I should be careful with
what I ask for.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it's obvious that she's doing her best to make herself unobtrusive.
I can already feel a distance forming between us.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... I think I'll do one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower runs at an unsteady pace. Her determination to push
past her limits is affecting her performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is a getaway from the everyday, so I want her to enjoy
her time here. What can I do to help her relax?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Telling her she doesn't have to try so hard or that she ought to have
fun would probably end up having the opposite effect.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I could take a kinder, softer approach, like how she does with
everyone else around her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back on the time I've spent with Nishino Flower, the solution
suddenly comes to me. I don't know if it'll work, but I'll put my whole
heart into the effort.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (I couldn't run the way I wanted from start to finish...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh... Hello? Mom... Dad... What's going on?

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for calling in the middle of summer camp, but we haven't heard
from you in a while and were starting to worry.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
We know you tend to keep things to yourself, so we thought we'd
reach out instead.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: U-um, actually...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And I keep thinking I need to get myself together, so I don't bother
Trainer, but... Nothing I try works.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer's busy. I don't want to waste their time, but I still...

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Mom?

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text: Flower... You remind me of your father and I when we were younger.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you could try being more open with your feelings. I'm sure
Trainer wants that as well.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I know you're worried about burdening the people you care about,
but... I don't think that's how your trainer views it.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
After all, you're both trying your best to understand each other. You
can do that by letting them get to know you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Understand... each other?

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text:
You have to be brave, but I know you can do it, Flower. Because
you're the one who gave your mother and I courage.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Do you really think I can?

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text: Of course! Besides, hasn't your trainer also given you courage?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sob. I... I'm... so sorry...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (I remember what Trainer said to me when I cried.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Let me be your trainer!"

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Those words shook me to my core.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "You gave me courage too."

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Your words also gave me courage.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Mom, Dad. Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Sigh... Phew! Trainer, I'm done with the final lap!
choice_data_list:
Good job! We'll continue our training after
lunch!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer? Before we eat, I... I want to tell you something!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: F-for the longest time, I was worried that I was bothering you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Uh, like the day you went out for lunch with the other trainers. I gave
you that bento without even considering that you might have had
plans already.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
All you did was tell me you liked the food, but I was so happy that... I
went overboard...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that I was invited to lunch after I finished eating her food. I
truly was happy about receiving it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
R-really? Then... I misunderstood again... I... Oh, this is so
embarrassing!
choice_data_list: Actually, now that you mention it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take out a bento box from my cooler bag. It's a token of the
appreciation I'd been trying to convey to Nishino Flower for so long.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: A bento... f-for me? And you made it yourself?!
choice_data_list: It might not taste as good as yours, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I... I'm so happy right now!
choice_data_list: Happiness is better when it's shared, right?
Happiness is better when it's shared, right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Ehehe. Right! I put my heart into the lunch I made for you, and
I'm sure yours was made the same way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We have lunch by the beach. Nishino Flower happily bites into a
slightly burned omelet.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Next time, let's try a bento exchange. I'll make sure to include lots of
your favorite foods.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's why, um... Could you maybe put my favorite foods in the one
you make, too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we spend an enjoyable lunch talking about Nishino Flower's
favorite and least favorite foods, as well as new things she wants to
try out.
